project_hint.name: FitCheck
project_hint.description: Web application that scans e-commerce product pages and determines vehicle compatibility using Playwright rendering and a two-stage LangChain LLM pipeline

technologies_found.name: FastAPI
technologies_found.role_in_project: Hosts the REST API (/api/analyze, /api/health), serves the static frontend, registers middleware (CORS, rate limit), and centralizes AppError exception handling
technologies_found.typical_purpose: Async Python web framework for building typed HTTP APIs
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Native async fits Playwright fetch and LangChain ainvoke; automatic OpenAPI docs and Pydantic request/response validation without Flask/Django boilerplate

technologies_found.name: Playwright
technologies_found.role_in_project: Launches headless Chromium to render product pages (including SPAs) before HTML extraction; singleton browser reused across requests with lifespan cleanup
technologies_found.typical_purpose: Browser automation for reliable page rendering and network-aware fetching
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Executes JavaScript for Next.js/Vue storefronts that static HTTP clients cannot render; built-in navigation and response inspection for bot-block diagnostics

technologies_found.name: LangChain
technologies_found.role_in_project: LCEL chains for two-stage pipeline: extract product/fitment JSON from page text, then analyze vehicle compatibility; chains cached per provider and stage
technologies_found.typical_purpose: Composable LLM application framework with prompts, parsers, and provider adapters
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Prompt | llm | parser pipelines are testable and swappable; provider-specific chat models plug in without rewriting orchestration

technologies_found.name: Anthropic Claude
technologies_found.role_in_project: Primary LLM provider in auto mode (claude-3-5-haiku) for extract and analyze stages via langchain-anthropic ChatAnthropic
technologies_found.typical_purpose: Cloud LLM for structured extraction and reasoning tasks
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Default-first in auto provider order; Haiku model balances cost and latency for two chained calls per scan

technologies_found.name: OpenAI GPT
technologies_found.role_in_project: Fallback LLM provider (gpt-4o-mini) when Anthropic fails with quota, rate-limit, or overload errors
technologies_found.typical_purpose: Cloud LLM API for chat completions
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Automatic failover in _invoke_with_fallback improves availability without user-facing provider selection

technologies_found.name: Pydantic
technologies_found.role_in_project: Defines AnalyzeRequest/AnalyzeResponse models, Settings from environment, and validates API payloads and LLM output shapes
technologies_found.typical_purpose: Data validation and settings management for Python applications
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: FastAPI-native validation; pydantic-settings loads .env into typed Settings with lru_cache singleton

technologies_found.name: BeautifulSoup4
technologies_found.role_in_project: Parses fetched HTML to extract JSON-LD, __NEXT_DATA__, OG/meta tags, and fitment-related DOM blocks into combined text for the LLM
technologies_found.typical_purpose: HTML/XML parsing library for web scraping and content extraction
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: CSS selectors and script tag parsing handle heterogeneous e-commerce page structures without site-specific scrapers

technologies_found.name: slowapi
technologies_found.role_in_project: Per-IP rate limiting (default 10 req/min) on analyze endpoint via SlowAPIMiddleware and shared Limiter keyed by remote address
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Protects expensive Playwright+LLM pipeline from abuse without custom Redis-backed limiter for a single-node deployment
technologies_found.alternatives_considered: nginx rate limits only, custom in-memory counter

technologies_found.name: Docker
technologies_found.role_in_project: Single image bundles Python backend, Playwright Chromium, frontend static files, and healthcheck; compose sets shm_size 1gb for browser stability
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Reproduces Playwright system dependencies on VPS without manual apt installs; restart unless-stopped for production

technologies_found.name: pytest
technologies_found.role_in_project: Unit tests for URL validation, extractor, prefilter, LLM pipeline, fetch diagnostics; integration tests for API; smoke_test script for live server checks
technologies_found.advantages_over_alternatives: pytest-asyncio and pytest-mock support async FastAPI routes and mocked Playwright/LLM dependencies

patterns_found.name: Two-stage LLM pipeline with early exit
patterns_found.description: Extract stage pulls product and fitment data; analyze stage runs only when fitment is detected
patterns_found.role_in_project: Skips second LLM call when extract finds no fitment, returning a no-fitment compatibility result immediately
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Cuts token cost and latency roughly in half on pages without vehicle data; keeps analyze prompt focused on fitment matching

patterns_found.name: SSRF-safe URL validation
patterns_found.description: Blocks localhost, private IPs, file://, internal hostnames, and DNS rebinding before any fetch
patterns_found.role_in_project: validate_url resolves hostnames and rejects private/loopback targets to prevent server-side request forgery on user-supplied product URLs
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Defense in depth beyond scheme checks; socket resolution catches rebinding to metadata endpoints like 169.254.169.254

patterns_found.name: Structured multi-source content extraction
patterns_found.description: Combines JSON-LD, Next.js __NEXT_DATA__, OG tags, meta, and fitment DOM selectors
patterns_found.role_in_project: extract_content merges heterogeneous e-commerce signals into combined_text for downstream prefilter and LLM stages
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Works across Shopify, Next.js, and custom fitment tables without per-retailer scraper modules

patterns_found.name: Rule-based LLM prefilter
patterns_found.description: Scores lines by fitment keywords and penalizes noise before sending text to LLM
patterns_found.role_in_project: prefilter_content ranks and truncates extracted text to high-signal fitment lines within max_chars budget
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Reduces input tokens and hallucination risk without an extra LLM summarization call

patterns_found.name: LLM provider fallback
patterns_found.description: Anthropic-first with OpenAI retry on quota/rate-limit errors
patterns_found.role_in_project: _invoke_with_fallback iterates get_provider_order and retries on FALLBACK_ERROR_MARKERS when a second API key is configured
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Improves uptime during provider outages without manual failover configuration per request

patterns_found.name: Bot protection diagnostics
patterns_found.description: Detects Cloudflare, eBay, Amazon, and generic CAPTCHA interstitials in fetch responses
patterns_found.role_in_project: detect_bot_protection and build_fetch_diagnostics enrich FETCH_BLOCKED errors with vendor, suggestions, and optional debug payload
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Actionable error responses for marketplace bot blocks instead of opaque 403 failures; supports per-request debug mode

patterns_found.name: Pipeline orchestration service
patterns_found.description: analyzer.analyze_product sequences validate → fetch → extract → prefilter → LLM with per-stage timings
patterns_found.role_in_project: Single orchestrator coordinates services and returns AnalyzeResponse with usage and timings for observability
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Route handlers stay thin; each stage is independently testable and timed for performance tuning

patterns_found.name: Typed application error taxonomy
patterns_found.description: AppError with ErrorCode enum mapped to HTTP status and structured JSON error bodies
patterns_found.role_in_project: Consistent error codes (URL_BLOCKED, FETCH_BLOCKED, LLM_ERROR, etc.) consumed by frontend for user-facing messages and retry hints
patterns_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Clients distinguish validation vs fetch vs LLM failures without parsing free-text exception messages

accomplishments_found.title: SPA-aware vehicle compatibility scanner
accomplishments_found.role_in_project: End-to-end web app that accepts a product URL and vehicle description, renders the page in Chromium, extracts fitment signals, and returns structured compatibility analysis
accomplishments_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Handles JavaScript-rendered storefronts and chains two LLM stages with early exit instead of brittle regex-only fitment parsers

accomplishments_found.title: Token-efficient LLM fitment analysis
accomplishments_found.role_in_project: Combines multi-source HTML extraction, rule-based prefilter scoring, and conditional second-stage analyze call to minimize tokens per scan
accomplishments_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Avoids sending full page HTML to the LLM and skips analyze entirely when no fitment data exists

accomplishments_found.title: Marketplace bot-block diagnostics
accomplishments_found.role_in_project: Fetch layer detects vendor-specific bot protection and returns structured suggestions and optional debug headers/body preview for 403 and challenge pages
accomplishments_found.advantages_over_alternatives: Operators can diagnose eBay/Amazon blocks on VPS deployments without SSH log diving; debug mode exposed in UI and API

architecture_notes: FastAPI serves static frontend from / and /static; POST /api/analyze drives the full pipeline orchestrated by analyzer.analyze_product.
Playwright browser is a process-wide singleton launched on first fetch and closed on app lifespan shutdown.
LLM_PROVIDER=auto prefers Anthropic then OpenAI; both API keys enable transparent fallback on rate limits.
Docker image installs Chromium via playwright install; compose shm_size 1gb prevents browser crashes under load.
Optional Bright Data residential proxy settings exist in config for datacenter IP bypass (disabled by default).
Response includes per-stage timings (validate, fetch, extract, prefilter, llm_extract, llm_analyze) and token usage per LLM stage.
